title: Radiant Capital - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by manipulation of collateral value in newly launched market

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls flashloan() followed by a tx that manipulates collateral value in the same market within 60 seconds
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN -> manipulateCollateralValue() in the same market within 60 seconds

red_flags: quick execution of flash loan and manipulation within 6 seconds
newly launched market with zero total supply
vulnerable_contracts: Radiant Capital's USDC market on Arbitrum
monitoring_rules: BLOCK flashloan() -> manipulateCollateralValue() in the same market within 60 seconds
summary: Radiant Capital lost $4.5M due to a flash loan exploit in a newly launched market. The attacker manipulated the collateral value shortly after the market was activated, exploiting a rounding error. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for flash loans followed by collateral value manipulations.
